reviews.review_msg:
Her personal digs, wishy-washy feedback, heavily biased views of art, and tendency to single out students ended up uniting the class through trauma-bonding. Acted very affronted when someone made a Kahoot for a seminar icebreaker.
To future students: open up to your peers if you notice anything off about her! Don't let her make you feel isolated.
Belittles students and does not provide productive feedback on projects. Arbitrarily decides who she will single out in classes, if she doesn't like you good luck.

Tells students to change their ideas on the last week before critiques. Has a very conservative idea of art, and if you don't align with it, don't expect a good grade no matter how much you try to clarify your intent.

Makes passive-aggressive comments, and contradicts herself when called out. Overall, makes you feel horrible about your ideas.
disorganized, gaslighter, her “feedback” is getting you to do what she wants, her lectures are boring, her powerpoints are useless

WONDERFUL TEACHER!!!  She's completely committed to ensuring students understand the material, and she doesn't perpetuate any hierarchy within the studio.  Extremely knowledgeable, supportive, and current, Sabine is a true professional while being 100% approachable!
